items.summary: Investigate and fix the error that appears during the booking submission flow. Ensure that when a booking fails (validation error, backend error, or network issue), a clear, user-friendly error message is displayed in both Hindi and English. When a booking succeeds, show a proper success confirmation message instead of an error.

Add or update bilingual translation strings in translations.ts for booking error and success states, covering: generic submission error, network/backend unavailable error, and booking confirmation success message — in both Hindi and English.

Review the backend createBooking or equivalent booking mutation endpoint in main.mo to ensure it returns a proper error variant (e.g., #err) when booking creation fails, so the frontend can distinguish success from failure reliably.
